creator: tijl@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->closed

The problem with fvwm has been fixed already.  A new set of packages will 
be built on Wednesday and should become available a few days later. 
The problem with twm must be something else because it does not use iconv. 
It also just works over here.  If you still want to see it work then please 
open a separate PR and include console output and/or /var/log/Xorg.0.log.
